PowerShell($p = Start-Process node -ArgumentList "index.js" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\Node project\\video calling app\\server" -PassThru -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardOutput "d:\\Node project\\video calling app\\server\\b.log" -RedirectStandardError "d:\\Node project\\video calling app\\server\\b.err"; Start-Sleep 3; try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:3001/health; "health: $\($h|ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; $body = @{ room="test-room"; name="Kamran" } | ConvertTo-Json; $t = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:3001/token -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; "token len: $\($t.token.Length\)"; "identity: $\($t.identity\)"; "url: $\($t.url\)"; "jwt header: $\($t.token.Split\('.'\)[0]\)" } catch { "ERR: $_" }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "d:\\Node project\\video calling app\\server\\b.log","d:\\Node project\\video calling app\\server\\b.err" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell("=== :3001 listening? ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; "=== try HTTPS /health ==="; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "https://localhost:3001/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4; "HTTPS ok: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "HTTPS err: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "=== try HTTP /health ==="; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3001/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4; "HTTP ok: $\($r2.Content\)" } catch { "HTTP err: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($p = Start-Process node -ArgumentList "index.js" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\Node project\\video calling app\\server" -PassThru -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\tok.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\tok.err"; Start-Sleep 3; [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = {$true}; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "https://localhost:3001/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTPS ok: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "HTTPS err: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "--- stdout ---"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\tok.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "--- stderr ---"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\tok.err" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($p = Start-Process "npm.cmd" -ArgumentList "run","start","--prefix","client" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\Node project\\video calling app" -PassThru -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\nx.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\nx.err"; Start-Sleep 8; try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/token"; "GET health: $\($h|ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; $body = @{room="test-room"; name="Kamran"} | ConvertTo-Json; $t = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/token" -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; "POST token len: $\($t.token.Length\)"; "identity: $\($t.identity\)"; "url: $\($t.url\)" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(npm run build --prefix client 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Compiled|error|Error|api/token" -SimpleMatch; "=== runtime test ==="; $p = Start-Process "npm.cmd" -ArgumentList "run","start","--prefix","client" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\Node project\\video calling app" -PassThru -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\nx2.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\nx2.err"; Start-Sleep 8; try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/token"; "GET: $\($h|ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; $t = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/token" -Method Post -Body \(@{room="test";name="Kamran"}|ConvertTo-Json\) -ContentType "application/json"; "POST token len: $\($t.token.Length\), identity: $\($t.identity\), url: $\($t.url\)" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
